build.beforeBuildCommand: bun run build && bun run build:sidecar

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; media-src 'self' data: blob:; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first desktop control plane for Discord auto-message sessions.
bundle.longDescription: Discord Auto Message Sender is a Bun, Tauri, Vite, and React desktop app for local config editing, dry-run preview, preflight validation, session control, persistent logs, and resumable checkpoints.
